title: The Petition Gains Hope
description: On pages 11–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The core beat is the petition gains hope.
scene: The scene follows the petition gains hope, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Eee Ehhh Huhhhh ?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Sea Kings !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: There is a legend...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What just happened ...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It cannot be mere coincidence ...

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: Shirahoshii... can't be that you will

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The legend tells that long ago, an incredible power lay hidden below the waves.... a mermaid princess with the ability to command even the sea kings....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was in pursuit of this legend that the very first vander decken set sail for the depths....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: My ancestors!!! I have finally found it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The treasure that you sought!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Good going, Captain!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: SSHHHH!!! BE QUIET, YOU TWO!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is only my clan who know the full truth of this legend!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...First, I must make the Princess my bride!!

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: But Princess Shirahoshii is still just a kid!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: MMMMM, YES, THAT IS A PROBLEM!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Aladdin ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I will... treat this man...

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: Your majesty, your wounds too must be seen to...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A few short weeks later, his treatment complete...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...the tenryubito was restored to health...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I won't forget this, you stinking fish!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The nerve of it all!! Livestock turning upon their masters...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will make you regret what you did....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What right does he have to resent us after we saved his life...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We shouldn't send him back...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It will only bring danger to this island ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait, please!! It would seem that we still have much to discuss.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As such, I will accompany you to the surface!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: Your majesty... you can't be serious!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Wait right there, Otohime !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I cannot allow such a reckless act!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you truly are intent on negotiating with these nobles, then I will go myself!!!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: Your majesty !!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I can't imagine that the King would be captured by the humans, but still...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: No...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It would be meaningless for you to go.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It must be not a powerful warrior, but a physically frail individual such as myself`who goes to the surface and returns safely.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That is the only way to prove that it is safe for our people in the world above!

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: Mother!!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: QUEEN OTOHIME, WHERE ARE YOU GOING?!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: QUEEN OTOHIME!!

summary: The Petition Gains Hope. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
